Step into the shadows with Afterlife Tales—the ghost tour they warned us not to run. For 90 chilling minutes, explore true stories of death, darkness, and the unexplained at the Hobart Convict Penitentiary and beyond. Walk the halls where 32 souls met the noose, feel the weight of history in the gallows, and follow your lantern-lit path through haunted tunnels echoing with disembodied footsteps. This is Tasmania’s darker side—revealed only after dark. Dare to join us? TICKETS: This is an adults-only tour and not for.

evidence_summary: Greenough ghost tour and sleepover – National Trust National Trust Toggle navigation Open Search Form Select State Join Donate EventWestern AustraliaGreenough ghost tour and sleepover Greenough ghost tour and sleepover Event WA Ghost hunt with medium Anthony Grezelka on Saturday 1 April 2023 Anthony is returning again to the Historic township of Greenough, located 24 km south of Geraldton (400 km North of Perth) for his annual ghost tour. Greenough was one of the first settlements in Western Australia and there are eleven buildings standing that we can explore. Boasting two churches, a convent, presbytery, school, the government complex that houses the court house and old gaol facilities and a community hall where the old time dances are still held today.
